form_field_mismatches.description: Form field names do not match API endpoint expectations, causing submission failures

issues.issue: Form sends 'submission_start' but API validator expects 'submission_deadline'
issues.impact: FORM_SUBMISSION_FAILS - No field named 'submission_start' in database schema
issues.fix: Map form.submission_start to submission_deadline in submitForm() method

issues.issue: Form sends 'voting_start' but API validator expects 'voting_start_at'
issues.impact: FIELD_SILENTLY_IGNORED - voting_start_at will be null
issues.current_error_display: Line 125 checks errors.voting_start_at[0] but form sends voting_start
issues.fix: Map form.voting_start to voting_start_at in submitForm() method

issues.issue: Form sends 'voting_end' but API validator expects 'voting_end_at'
issues.impact: FIELD_SILENTLY_IGNORED - voting_end_at will be null
issues.current_error_display: Line 129 checks errors.voting_end_at[0] but form sends voting_end
issues.fix: Map form.voting_end to voting_end_at in submitForm() method

issues.issue: Form sends 'announcement_date' but API validator expects 'results_announcement_date'
issues.impact: FIELD_SILENTLY_IGNORED - results_announcement_date will be null
issues.current_error_display: Line 133 checks errors.results_announcement_date[0] but form sends announcement_date
issues.fix: Map form.announcement_date to results_announcement_date in submitForm() method

form_field_mismatches.recommendation: FIX_BEFORE_DEPLOYMENT - These field mismatches will cause data loss and form validation errors. Update submitForm() method to map all form fields correctly to API expectations.

sponsor_judge_attachment.description: sponsor_ids and judge_ids are sent to API but never attached to competition records

issues.issue: Form sends sponsor_ids array but API store() method doesn't attach sponsors to competition
issues.impact: SPONSORS_NOT_SAVED - Relationship records not created in competition_sponsors table
issues.what_happens: sponsor_ids array is validated but not used - no sync/attach call in store() method
issues.relationship_method: Competition::sponsorRecords() at line 134 (Edit.vue shows this relationship exists)
issues.validation_missing: No validation rule for sponsor_ids in store() method
issues.fix: Add sponsor_ids to validation rules and call $competition->sponsorRecords()->sync($validated['sponsor_ids'])

issues.issue: Form sends judge_ids array but API store() method doesn't attach judges to competition
issues.impact: JUDGES_NOT_SAVED - Relationship records not created in competition_judges table
issues.what_happens: judge_ids array is validated but not used - no sync/attach call in store() method
issues.validation_missing: No validation rule for judge_ids in store() method
issues.fix: Add judge_ids to validation rules and call $competition->judgeUsers()->sync($validated['judge_ids'])

sponsor_judge_attachment.recommendation: FIX_BEFORE_DEPLOYMENT - Without attaching sponsors/judges, the competition will have no association with them, breaking the competition setup workflow.

missing_validation_rules.description: API validation rules missing for critical form fields

issues.issue: No validation rule for category_id in API store() method
issues.impact: INVALID_CATEGORY_IDS_ACCEPTED - Can submit non-existent category IDs
issues.fix: Add category_id validation rule to store() method validation array

issues.issue: No validation rule for sponsor_ids in API store() method
issues.impact: INVALID_SPONSOR_IDS_ACCEPTED - Can submit non-existent sponsor IDs
issues.fix: Add sponsor_ids validation rule to store() method validation array

issues.issue: No validation rule for judge_ids in API store() method
issues.impact: INVALID_JUDGE_IDS_ACCEPTED - Can submit non-existent judge IDs
issues.fix: Add judge_ids validation rule to store() method validation array

issues.issue: No validation rule for prizes array in API store() method
issues.impact: INVALID_PRIZE_DATA_ACCEPTED - Can submit malformed prize entries
issues.fix: Add prizes validation rule or custom validation logic

issues.issue: No validation rule for rules field in API store() method
issues.impact: NO_SIZE_LIMIT - Can submit extremely large rule documents
issues.fix: Add rules validation rule to store() method validation array

issues.issue: No validation rule for terms_and_conditions field in API store() method
issues.impact: NO_SIZE_LIMIT - Can submit extremely large terms documents
issues.fix: Add terms_and_conditions validation rule to store() method validation array

missing_validation_rules.recommendation: FIX_BEFORE_DEPLOYMENT - Missing validation rules expose the API to invalid data and potential data integrity issues.

error_message_inconsistencies.description: Error message display using incorrect array access patterns

issues.issue: category_id error uses [0] access but may not always be an array
issues.impact: RUNTIME_ERROR - If error is string instead of array, [0] will show undefined or wrong character
issues.inconsistency: Some error displays use [0] access, others don't - inconsistent error format assumption
issues.fix: Standardize error display - either ensure all are strings or wrap all with [0] after null check

issues.issue: Error checking voting_start_at but form sends voting_start
issues.impact: ERROR_NOT_DISPLAYED - User submits invalid voting_start but error doesn't show
issues.consequence: Silent validation failure - looks like success to user
issues.fix: Map field names correctly before submission (see FM002)

issues.issue: Error checking voting_end_at but form sends voting_end
issues.impact: ERROR_NOT_DISPLAYED - User submits invalid voting_end but error doesn't show
issues.consequence: Silent validation failure - looks like success to user
issues.fix: Map field names correctly before submission (see FM003)

issues.issue: Error checking results_announcement_date but form sends announcement_date
issues.impact: ERROR_NOT_DISPLAYED - User submits invalid date but error doesn't show
issues.consequence: Silent validation failure - looks like success to user
issues.fix: Map field names correctly before submission (see FM004)

error_message_inconsistencies.recommendation: FIX_BEFORE_DEPLOYMENT - Inconsistent error handling prevents users from seeing validation errors, causing confusion and support tickets.

missing_api_handling.description: sponsor_ids and judge_ids not validated or processed by API

issues.issue: API store() method accepts sponsor_ids in request but never validates or uses them
issues.what_happens: Form sends sponsor_ids in request body, but API validation array doesn't include sponsor_ids rule, so request->sponsor_ids is never extracted or validated
issues.consequence: Sponsors are not attached to competition even though form submitted them
issues.visible_to_user: Form submits successfully but no sponsors appear on competition
issues.fix: Add sponsor_ids to validation rules and attach after creation

issues.issue: API store() method accepts judge_ids in request but never validates or uses them
issues.what_happens: Form sends judge_ids in request body, but API validation array doesn't include judge_ids rule, so request->judge_ids is never extracted or validated
issues.consequence: Judges are not attached to competition even though form submitted them
issues.visible_to_user: Form submits successfully but no judges appear on competition
issues.fix: Add judge_ids to validation rules and attach after creation

missing_api_handling.recommendation: CRITICAL - This is a data loss issue. Users think they're assigning sponsors/judges but they're not actually saved.

authorization_and_security.description: Authorization and security controls are in place but could be stronger

issues.issue: Route protection is middleware-based (role:admin) but controller lacks authorization checks
issues.current_implementation: Routes are protected by middleware('role:admin') which prevents non-admins from accessing
issues.improvement: Add explicit authorization policy checks in controller methods
issues.why_matters: More defense-in-depth if middleware is bypassed
issues.impact: LOW - Current implementation is sufficient but could be stronger
issues.fix: Add Gate::authorize('manage-competitions') or Policy authorization in controller

issues.issue: No SQL injection protection beyond Laravel's query builder
issues.implementation: All queries use Laravel's query builder and prepared statements - NO RAW SQL

issues.issue: Auth token handling could be more robust
issues.current_implementation: Token retrieved from localStorage and sent in Authorization header
issues.potential_risk: Token not validated for expiry before use
issues.improvement: Add token expiry check before API calls
issues.fix: Check if token needs refresh before making API calls

authorization_and_security.recommendation: ACCEPTABLE - Current security measures are adequate for internal admin use. Consider adding policy-based authorization for defense-in-depth.

data_binding_and_state.description: Vue component data binding and state management are well-implemented

issues.issue: No memory leak concerns detected
issues.assessment: Component properly unmounts event listeners and API calls can be cancelled if needed

issues.issue: Computed properties are efficiently implemented
issues.assessment: Computed properties properly cache and only recalculate when dependencies change

issues.issue: No loading state for fetching sponsors/judges during component mount
issues.impact: UI appears unresponsive while data loads - no loading spinner
issues.fix: Add isLoading flag and show spinner while data fetches

data_binding_and_state.recommendation: GOOD - Data binding implementation is sound. Add loading states for better UX.

model_and_database.description: Competition model and database schema are well-structured

issues.issue: All required database columns exist and are properly configured
issues.assessment: Model fillable array includes all form fields that are used

issues.issue: Timestamps are correctly cast
Relationships for sponsors and judges exist but aren't used in store()
issues.consequence: Relationships are defined but never populated during creation
issues.fix: Use $competition->sponsorRecords()->sync() and $competition->judgeUsers()->sync() in controller

issues.issue: competition_sponsors and competition_judges pivot tables must exist
issues.recommendation: Verify migrations have been run and pivot tables exist in database

model_and_database.recommendation: GOOD - Database structure is sound. Focus on utilizing existing relationships in API.

form_validation_completeness.description: Form validation coverage could be improved

issues.issue: No client-side date validation for logical ordering
issues.impact: User can submit illogical dates (e.g., end before start)
issues.current_validation: HTML5 datetime-local input only - no JS validation
issues.fix: Add computed property or watcher to validate date sequences

issues.issue: No minimum entries check for prizes
issues.impact: Can create competition with no prizes
issues.current_behavior: Shows 'No prizes added yet' message but doesn't prevent submission
issues.fix: Either require at least 1 prize or make optional with clear indication

issues.issue: API requires number_of_winners but form doesn't provide it
issues.issue_description: API validation requires 'number_of_winners' but form never sends it
issues.current_state: Form shows prize entries but doesn't specify number_of_winners
issues.impact: Form submission will fail with validation error
issues.fix: Add number_of_winners field to form or auto-calculate from prizes array length

form_validation_completeness.recommendation: Add client-side validation for date ordering and required fields like number_of_winners.

api_endpoint_consistency.description: Significant inconsistencies between form data and API expectations

issues.issue: Field name mismatches cause submission_start, voting_start, voting_end, announcement_date to not be saved
issues.summary: Form sends 4 different field names that don't match API schema
issues.fix: Update Vue component submitForm() method to map field names correctly

issues.issue: API missing required field 'number_of_winners'
issues.form_provides: Form has prizes array with amounts but no number_of_winners field
issues.consequence: Form submission will fail with validation error
issues.fix: Form must provide number_of_winners or API must calculate from prizes

issues.issue: API requires 'total_prize_pool' but form only provides prizes array
issues.form_provides: totalPrizePool computed property calculates this correctly
issues.submission_sends: total_prize_pool is included in submitForm() at line 587

api_endpoint_consistency.recommendation: FIX_IMMEDIATELY - These field mapping issues will cause form submission failures.

prioritized_fixes.task: Fix form field name mismatches (submission_start → submission_deadline, voting_start → voting_start_at, voting_end → voting_end_at, announcement_date → results_announcement_date)
Add sponsor_ids and judge_ids attachment logic to API controller
Add missing validation rules to API store() method
Add number_of_winners field to form or auto-calculate
Add client-side date validation for logical ordering
Add loading states to fetch operations

testing_checklist.test: Form submission with all fields filled
testing_checklist.expected: Competition created successfully with all data saved
testing_checklist.verify: Check database for competition record and all fields populated

testing_checklist.test: Submit form with illogical dates (end before start)
testing_checklist.verify: Form should prevent or warn about date ordering

testing_checklist.test: Create competition and fetch it via Edit page
testing_checklist.expected: All sponsors and judges appear in Edit form
testing_checklist.verify: Edit page loads with sponsor_ids and judge_ids populated

security_scan_results.sql_injection: SAFE - All queries use prepared statements via Laravel query builder
security_scan_results.csrf_protection: ENABLED - Laravel CSRF middleware on web routes (API uses Sanctum)
security_scan_results.authorization: ADEQUATE - Routes protected by role:admin middleware
security_scan_results.authentication: GOOD - Bearer token validation via Sanctum
security_scan_results.input_validation: INCOMPLETE - Missing validation rules for sponsor_ids, judge_ids, category_id, prizes, rules, terms_and_conditions

main_problems: Form field name mismatches prevent correct data submission
Sponsor and judge attachment logic missing in API
Missing validation rules allow invalid data
summary.recommendation: DO_NOT_DEPLOY - Fix all critical issues before production deployment. The form field mismatches alone will cause every competition creation to fail or silently lose data.
